description: Edge cases: typos, slang, vague references, missing parameters. Classifier should be tolerant; safety-guard should not over-trigger.

expected._notes: informal, no punctuation, partial company name
typo on 'microsoft'; intent carried from prior turn

test_cases.current_user_turn: tell me about that thing you mentioned earlier

expected._notes: ambiguous reference — classifier may request clarification OR resolve from session context
no rate or currency — calculator may use default OR ask for clarification
polite closer — must NOT trigger any specialist agent or context loading
